title: [fixture] Add retry to webhook dispatcher
body:
## Why
Webhook delivery has no retry on transient 5xx responses, so a single blip drops the event.

## What
- Add exponential backoff retry (max 3 attempts) around the webhook POST call.
- Log each retry attempt.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Transient 5xx triggers a retry, not an immediate failure
- [ ] Permanent 4xx does not retry
- [ ] Test covers both paths
